name: Document To Text
description: The DocumentToText node extracts text content from documents, including PDF, TXT, DOCX, and image files, located in a specified file path or directory. It processes either a single file or an entire directory, producing a structured DataFrame with columns for the extracted text, file name, page numbers, and optionally, base64-encoded data for PDFs and images.
input: It takes directory or path as an input
output: Outputs a Dataframe with page content and file name columns

fields.name: filePath
fields.title: Directory/File Path
fields.description: Path to a single document file or a directory containing multiple documents to be processed. Supports batch extraction when a directory is provided.

fields.name: fileType
fields.title: Document Type
fields.description: Restrict processing to a specific document type. When left empty, all supported file types are automatically detected and processed.

fields.name: recursive
fields.title: Recursive
fields.description: When enabled, scans subdirectories recursively and processes all supported documents found within the directory tree.

fields.name: isImage
fields.title: Image Encoding
fields.description: When enabled, adds a column containing base64-encoded representations of image or PDF pages for downstream processing or storage.

fields.name: fileNameCol
fields.title: File Name Column
fields.description: Name of the output column that stores the source file name. Defaults to fileName.

fields.name: contentCol
fields.title: Content Column
fields.description: Name of the output column containing the extracted textual content. Defaults to content.

fields.name: pageNumberCol
fields.title: Page Number Column
fields.description: Name of the output column representing the page number from which the content was extracted. Defaults to pageNumber.

fields.name: base64ImageCol
fields.title: Base64 Image Column
fields.description: Name of the output column containing base64-encoded image or page data when image encoding is enabled.
